summary: Testing iteration 13 - Verified TWO BUG FIXES: 1) AJPL Rate textboxes now remain visible after saving rates (tested multiple saves), 2) Reports Feedbacks tab is now visible and accessible (all 8 tabs display properly with flex-wrap).

minor.issue: Console warning 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on Reports page load - affects recharts rendering temporarily but charts load correctly afterward

passed_tests: AJPL Rate Management - All 5 purity textboxes visible (24KT, 22KT, 20KT, 18KT, 14KT)
AJPL Rate Save Flow - Textboxes REMAIN visible after saving with success toast 'AJPL rates saved!'
AJPL Multiple Saves - Tested 3 consecutive saves, all 5 textboxes remain each time
Normal Rate Save Flow - Textboxes remain visible after save
Reports Feedbacks Tab - Tab trigger visible in TabsList with flex-wrap
Reports Feedbacks Content - Feedback list renders correctly (shows 1 feedback from Test Customer)
All 8 Report tabs visible - Overview, KT Analysis, Branches, Executives, References, Customers, Top Items, Feedbacks
Backend: GET /api/rates returns both normal and ajpl rate cards
Backend: GET /api/rates/ajpl has all 5 purities with rates
Backend: PUT /api/rates/ajpl preserves purities after save
Backend: Auto-heal mechanism works - empty purities sync from purities collection
critical_code_review_comments: RateManagement.js loadData() correctly syncs purities from purities collection if rate card purities are empty - frontend auto-heal working
RateManagement.js saveRates() correctly maps purities with all required fields (purity_id, purity_name, purity_percent, rate_per_10g)
server.py GET /api/rates auto-heals empty purities by syncing from purities collection
server.py PUT /api/rates/{type} guards against saving empty purities
Reports.js TabsList has 'flex flex-wrap h-auto gap-1 p-1' classes allowing 8 tabs to wrap properly

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified both bugs fixed: 1) AJPL rate textboxes no longer disappear after save - frontend loadData() syncs purities and backend auto-heals empty purities, 2) Reports Feedbacks tab visible with TabsList flex-wrap. All 8 report tabs accessible. OTP delivery is MOCKED - codes shown on admin dashboard.

ajpl_rate_textboxes_disappear.details: Input textboxes for AJPL brand rates (24KT, 22KT, 20KT, 18KT, 14KT) remain visible after saving. Tested with 3 consecutive saves.
ajpl_rate_textboxes_disappear.fix_location: Frontend: RateManagement.js loadData() syncs purities. Backend: GET /api/rates auto-heals, PUT guards against empty purities

feedbacks_tab_not_visible.details: Feedbacks tab is visible on Reports page. All 8 tabs wrap properly using flex-wrap.
feedbacks_tab_not_visible.fix_location: Reports.js line 261: TabsList has 'flex flex-wrap h-auto gap-1 p-1' classes
